name: 詹娜·艾伯斯贝格尔
name_full: 詹娜·艾伯斯贝格尔 Jenna Ebersberger

last_movies.title: 乔治和曼迪的头婚生活 第二季

introduction: Jenna Ebersberger is an actress, writer, and incoming Sunday Company member at The Groundlings Theater in Los Angeles.Jenna received her MFA in Dramatic Writing from NYU and a Bachelor's in Theater and Journalism from Columbia College Chicago. Off stage, Jenna has worked in television production as a researcher for Saturday Night Live and in writing rooms, performing support staff positions.
